{{Quote|What we did wasn't noble, it was just butchery.|[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] to [[Anakin Solo]]|<ref name="Onslaught" />}}
The '''Battle of Dantooine''' was a battle on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Prelude==
Two months after the initial battle with the Vong at [[Helska IV]], New Republic forces (including [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and [[Anakin Solo]]) were forced to evacuate [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]] and [[Destrillion]]. Because most of the ships lacked enough supplies to reach the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]], the refugee convoy was forced to land on Dantooine and await aid. Refugees from conquered worlds were also brought to Dantooine and a [[Dantooine refugee base|refugee camp]] had been established. However, the Yuuzhan Vong weren't far behind.<ref name="Onslaught" />

==The battle==
[[File:DantooineRefugeeBase_njosb.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Layout of the refugee base.]]

The battle began after [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] discovered that [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warriors had infiltrated the refugee camp through the use of [[ooglith masquer]]s. During the struggle, Leia's loyal [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] bodyguard [[Bolpuhr]] was murdered. Meanwhile, a massive [[Chazrach]] assault force approached the camp. Despite its sheer size, the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] (including [[Anakin Solo|Anakin]] and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]) discovered that the reptoids were easy to defeat. However, the large number of Chazrach resulted in the Yuuzhan Vong gaining the upper hand over the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces.<ref name="Onslaught" />

[[File:LukeYVWDantooine.png|thumb|right|300px|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] during the battle.]]Later, Skywalker discovered that the Chazrach were controlled by a beetle-shaped war beast, which came to be known as a [[Thrall herder]]. The creature was protected by numerous [[dovin basal]]s which would intercept missiles and laser blasts directed at it. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was able to use the Force to seize the black hole and had it suck itself into its own void. As a result, the Chazrach assault force was scattered and began attacking everything that moved, including each other.<ref name="Onslaught" />

Despite this success, the Yuuzhan Vong still held the upper hand. As the melee raged on, so many New Republic soldiers and refugees were slaughtered that the refugee convoy no longer had supply problems and was once again able to leave the planet. [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] arrived in the nick of time with his flagship the ''Ralroost'' and the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Corusca Fire]]'' and escorted the convoy to safety, abandoning the planet to the Vong.<ref name="Onslaught" />

==Aftermath==
Following the battle, the Yuuzhan Vong nearly exterminated the planet's native [[Dantari]].  The battle ended in a defeat for the New Republic but the information gained from just the battle alone made up for the defeat.<ref name="Onslaught" />
